column1: C[matburt: Hey, I saw you resigned our previous match so I thought we could have another go at it
C[matburt: Hey, I saw you resigned our previous match so I thought we could have another go at it
C[matburt: How do you like the site so far?
C[matburt: Excellent... we certainly want people to like it and choose to play here
C[errol_orr: its good becose i dont need a client programm
C[matburt: I'm not crazy about client programs either.  Given that it's 2013 we should be able to do anything a client can do in the browser
C[errol_orr: is it you real rate - 26k? )
C[matburt: Well.... that's probably pretty generous. I'm not really that good
C[matburt: I'm a much better programmer than Go player... I'd like to get better though.
C[errol_orr: where the properties of our game? rules (Chinese or japanies), time, komi and so on
C[matburt: Yeah good point... it should be displayed on this view
matburt: in this case I created the game so I know
matburt: aga ruleset, 1 day play time with a standard clock, no handicap, 7.5 komi
C[matburt: That should be coming up on an update pretty soon
C[matburt: bleh F8.... I need to take a break from software and study the game more
C[errol_orr: what is F8 do? i dont understand
C[matburt: If you put board coordinates in the chat like so then mouse over it... it will highlight the stone location
matburt: I was just pointing out that I made a blunder
matburt: you can also do this:
C[errol_orr: its some kind of undu?
matburt: nope... it's just a highlight
C[matburt: and then the analysis is for sharing alternate moves
errol_orr: so i can Analyze Game when i plaing?
C[matburt: correct, and share the variations
errol_orr: ok it intresting, but strange too)
C[matburt: well say you were playing a weaker player like myself... you could show them a variation that might help them
errol_orr: it is some teaching game

matburt: hey there... sorry it has taken me a while.  Was asleep :)
